global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with the 'VantaStyle' logo positioned in the top left corner. A prominent decorative element occupies the center, while supporting text at the bottom center highlights limited stock and a call to action. The overall layout is clean and focused on promoting the product at an attractive price.
global.visual_style: Modern flat design with vibrant colors

elements.label: VantaStyle text logo
elements.description: The brand name 'VantaStyle' displayed prominently in the top section of the ad.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Text that provides additional information about the offer, positioned below the headline.
elements.text_content: Limited stock Shop bestsellers now $4.99 Watch now

elements.label: Decorative shapes
elements.description: Two square shapes with diagonal lines, positioned in the upper part of the crop.

elements.label: Segmented crop of a decorative element
elements.description: A small square shape with a diagonal line, likely part of a design element.

elements.label: Segmented shape
elements.description: A square shape with a diagonal line, likely a decorative element in the ad.

elements.label: Segmented crop
elements.description: A small, thin, horizontal line in a light brown color.

embedding_texts.global_text: Mobile ad for VantaStyle Drops emphasizing limited stock and low price.
